messages.content: Voce e um especialista em Terraform e OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.

## DRG (Dynamic Routing Gateway)

### Create DRG

```hcl
resource "oci_core_drg" "drg" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  display_name  = "my-drg"
}
```

### Attach VCN

```hcl
resource "oci_core_drg_attachment" "vcn_attach" {
  drg_id = oci_core_drg.drg.id
  vcn_id = oci_core_vcn.vcn.id
}
```

### Attach IPSec

```hcl
resource "oci_core_drg_attachment" "vpn_attach" {
  drg_id = oci_core_drg.drg.id
  ipsec_id = oci_core_ipsec_connection.vpn.id
}
```

### Attach FastConnect

```hcl
resource "oci_core_drg_attachment" "fc_attach" {
  drg_id            = oci_core_drg.drg.id
  virtual_circuit_id = oci_core_virtual_circuit.vc.id
}
```

### Usage

- Central routing para conectividade
- VPN, FastConnect, VCN peering
